title: Boston 2026
description:
From Thursday, March 26, 2026, to Sunday, March 29, 2026, you can obtain a special commemorative medal during the PAX East event at the Thomas M. Menino Convention & Exhibition Center in Boston, Massachusetts, USA.
Have fun exploring the venue, obtaining this special medal, and checking out other exciting activities during the event!
• Entry into the PAX East event venue is required to receive this medal.
• Purchase of an event ticket is required to enter the PAX East venue.

How to Receive the Medal:
1. Attend the PAX East event.
2. Explore the venue and locate the special event kiosk.
3. Launch your mobile device version of Pokémon HOME.
4. Open the menu, then tap Medals, Scan, and NFC Scan.
5. Hold your mobile device over the NFC tag to receive your medal!

Important Notes:
• You can receive this commemorative medal only once per day.
• Each scan will allow you to receive two medals with the same design.
• Medal issuance limits reset daily at 00:00 UTC (8:00 p.m. EDT local time).
• Service may be suspended without notice due to unavoidable circumstances.
• The medal feature will be unavailable during Pokémon HOME maintenance periods.
• We cannot respond to inquiries about medals that could not be received due to maintenance.
• Depending on your mobile device’s settings or condition, you may not be able to properly receive a medal. In such cases, no compensation will be provided.
• Pokémon HOME must be linked to a Nintendo Account in order to use the medal feature.
• When using certain devices that are not NFC-enabled, the NFC Scan option will not be displayed.
